---
description: Run SDD verification phase
agent: agent
argument-hint: "feature number, task details, or source artifact"
---
Run the SDD verification phase for feature [FEATURE NUMBER].

@test-verifier , verify test coverage, detect phantom completions, check spec-code drift. Gate: ≥90% pass, all P0 covered, zero phantoms.

## Output

Output concisely: return only the artifact path(s), validation status, next required action, and any critical findings or blockers. Do not narrate the process steps.
